# EAIOS — Enterprise AI Operating System

> EAIOS is an enterprise AI operating system that runs in the browser. It combines a hybrid
> multimodal RAG engine (BM25 + vector search fused with Reciprocal Rank Fusion, cited answers,
> confidence scores), nine cooperating AI agents behind a graph orchestrator, a self-building
> knowledge graph, enterprise search, a natural-language SQL assistant, visual workflow
> automations, voice input/output, and observability with span traces — presented as a desktop
> operating system with windows, a taskbar and a command palette.

Live demo: https://eaios.onrender.com (demo logins on the login screen; runs in demo mode with
no backend as well). Source: https://github.com/darshan-dalvi-AI/EAIOS

## What it does

- Ingests PDFs, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, CSV, text and images (OCR + vision captioning).
- Answers questions strictly from indexed company knowledge, with citations and confidence.
- A planning agent decomposes compound requests; specialist agents (document, SQL, research,
  email, report, analytics, memory, coding) execute; results merge into one answer.
- Extracts entities at ingest into a knowledge graph; answers "how are X and Y related?" with
  connection paths and evidence passages.
- Drag-and-drop automations (trigger → agent → condition → notify) run on the same agent runtime.
- Every request records a span waterfall (agent, retrieval, LLM timings) in a Traces app.
- LLM layer auto-detects: Groq Llama 3.1, local Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, deterministic fallback.
- Exposes an MCP server so AI assistants can call EAIOS search/ask/graph as tools.

## Docs

- Architecture: https://github.com/darshan-dalvi-AI/EAIOS/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- API reference: https://github.com/darshan-dalvi-AI/EAIOS/blob/main/docs/API_REFERENCE.md
- Deployment: https://github.com/darshan-dalvi-AI/EAIOS/blob/main/docs/DEPLOY.md

Author: Darshan Dalvi (B.E. Computer Engineering capstone, 2026).
